text:

Log:
  java/jakarta-bcel move to apache- and update to version 6.4.1

  The ASF retired Jakarta on 2011 and now bcel is part of Apache Commons.

  PR:	241122
  Approved by:	thierry (mentor), Maintainer timeout (2+ months)
